comment: "An amazing course with the true potential of granting confidence in recognizing when to perform sternotomy, thoracotomy, pulmonary tractotomy and other related cardiothoracic surgical interventions in cardiac trauma. Awesome indeed."
"This course provided an excellent foundation in trauma decision-making and surgical priorities. The clinical scenarios were realistic and thought-provoking."
"I liked it that it is scenario based and progressive with time."
"I really liked that this course equipped me with critical thinking and clincial knowledge."
